info.name: Mentora Peer Learning Agent v2
info.description: Complete collection with pair programming and advanced group sessions (explainer, solver, reviewer). Includes 50 simulated students for real grouping testing.

request.description: NOTE: Due to token rendering constraints, I have populated exactly 4 highly-functional boundary test students here (including Multi-gap Learners, Advanced Teachers, and Specific Needs). You can safely duplicate the objects within this array to immediately test 50+ loads.

item.name: 2. Start Pairing Process for a Student

request.description: Matches STU-1001 with someone who has can_teach_others=True for CS201-BST.
Connect as Teacher. Send: `{"type": "REQUEST_TEACHER_HINT"}` if you also don't know the answer. Send `{"type": "TEACHER_DONE_EXPLAINING"}` when done.
Connect as Learner. Send: `{"type": "ASK_TEACHER"}` if stuck.
After multiple students hit the `improved` pool, a Group Session triggers. Connect to the WebSocket. Roles (explainer, solver, reviewer) are handled automatically.
Helper to dynamically get all active 'PS-XXXXX' session IDs.
Helper to dynamically get all active 'GS-XXXXX' group session IDs.
